name: Bill Engvall
blurb: A member of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour, he built a successful recording career with the platinum-certified debut album Heres Your Sign.
bio: Bill Engvall is an American stand-up comedian and actor best known for his signature heres your sign routine, in which he assigns sarcastic signs to people he deems lacking in sense. A member of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour, he built a successful recording career with the platinum-certified debut album Heres Your Sign. His comedy centers on family, marriage, and everyday Southern American life.

timeline.ev: Named Best Male Stand-Up at the American Comedy Awards
Debut album Heres Your Sign released, later certified platinum
Joins the Blue Collar Comedy Tour

accolades: American Comedy Award, Best Male Stand-Up (1992)
Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album (shared, 2007)
